# agent-stack: AI 開発用 Docker コンテナスタック

## Overview

AI エージェント開発で使うツール群（RTK, mise, APM, Claude Code, Codex）を Docker コンテナとしてまとめ、再現可能な開発環境を構築する。ホスト OS の agent-browser（Vercel Labs）と連携し、ブラウザテストも統合する。

## Architecture

```
┌─ Host OS (macOS) ──────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  agent-browser (Chrome, port 9223)                     │
│  環境変数を env var として注入                          │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                         │ host.docker.internal
┌─ Docker Compose ───────┴───────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  ┌─ workspace ───────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Tools: RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM, gh, rg │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Volumes:                                         │ │
│  │    - /workspace ← project source (bind mount)     │ │
│  │    - ~/.claude  ← claude-home (named volume)      │ │
│  │    - ~/.codex   ← codex-home (named volume)       │ │
│  │    - ~/.local/share/mise ← mise-data (named vol)  │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Components

### Tools in Container

| Tool | Version | Purpose | Install Method |
|------|---------|---------|----------------|
| **RTK** | 0.42.4 | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% savings) | GitHub Releases からプリビルドバイナリ |
| **mise** | latest | Dev tool version manager (Node, Ruby, etc.) | curl https://mise.run |
| **Claude Code** | latest | Anthropic's AI CLI | curl https://claude.ai/install.sh |
| **Codex** | latest | OpenAI's AI CLI | curl https://chatgpt.com/codex/install.sh |
| **APM** | 0.16+ | Agent Package Manager | curl https://aka.ms/apm-unix |
| **gh** | latest | GitHub CLI | apt install |

### RTK が利用する外部コマンド

RTK は内部で外部コマンドを呼び出してフィルタリングする。コンテナに含める必要がある。

#### 必須（RTK が直接実行）

| Command | Purpose | Install |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **git** | VCS 操作 | apt |
| **grep** | テキスト検索（rg がない場合のフォールバック） | apt (coreutils) |
| **tree** | ディレクトリ表示 | apt |
| **curl** | HTTP client | apt |
| **wc** | 行数カウント等 | apt (coreutils) |

#### 推奨（RTK が自動検出して利用、大幅なトークン削減）

| Command | Purpose | Install | Savings |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| **rg** (ripgrep) | 高速 grep、RTK が自動的に利用 | apt or cargo | grep 比 80% 削減 |

#### プロキシ対象（開発で使うもの、RTK がラップ）

| Command | Purpose | Install |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **gh** | GitHub CLI | apt |
| **docker** | コンテナ操作（DinD/socket mount 時） | 必要に応じて |

> **Note:** RTK は単一 Rust バイナリで、外部ツールがなくても graceful に degradation する。
> `rg` は特に重要 — RTK の grep フィルタが自動で ripgrep を利用し、トークン消費を大幅削減する。

### Host OS Services

| Service | Purpose | Connection |
|---------|---------|------------|
| **agent-browser** | Browser automation with real Chrome | WebSocket on port 9223 |
| **環境変数** | Secret management | ホスト側で解決済みの値を env var で注入 |

## File Structure

```
agent-stack/
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── build-push.yml      # main push で ghcr.io に自動ビルド・push
├── docker/
│   └── Dockerfile              # Single-stage build (debian:trixie-slim)
├── config/
│   ├── claude/
│   │   ├── settings.json       # RTK hook + permission allowlist
│   │   └── CLAUDE.md           # Container-specific instructions
│   ├── codex/
│   │   └── instructions.md     # Container-specific instructions
│   └── mise/
│       └── config.toml         # Runtime versions (Node 23, Ruby, etc.)
├── compose.yml                 # Docker Compose orchestration
├── apm.yml                     # APM manifest
├── .mise.toml                  # Project-level mise config
├── .env.example                # Required environment variables
├── .gitignore
├── Makefile                    # Build/run/manage commands
├── architecture.md             # This file
└── CLAUDE.md                   # Project instructions
```

## Dockerfile Design

Single-stage build。全ツールがプリビルドバイナリまたはインストーラー（`curl`）で導入できるため、マルチステージ不要。

```
debian:trixie-slim
       │
  ┌────┴──────────┐
  │               │
  │ build-essential│
  │ locales (UTF-8)│
  │ RTK (deb)     │
  │ mise, gh      │
  │ rg, tree      │
  │ claude, codex │
  │ user: agent   │
  │               │
  └───────────────┘
```

## Docker Compose Services

### workspace

メインの開発コンテナ。全ツールを含み、プロジェクトソースをバインドマウント。

- **Build target**: `dev`
- **Volumes**: project source (bind), claude config (named), codex config (named), mise data (named)
- **Environment**: API keys via `.env`
- **Network**: `host.docker.internal` でホストの agent-browser に接続

## Secret Management

```
┌─ .env (gitignored) ─────────────────────┐
│ ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...            │
│ OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...                   │
│ GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...    │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────┘
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Docker Compose ────────────────────────┐
│ env_file: .env                          │
│   → workspace container                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Makefile Targets

| Target | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `make build` | Docker イメージビルド |
| `make dev` | 開発環境起動 |
| `make shell` | workspace コンテナにシェルで入る |
| `make claude` | コンテナ内で Claude Code 起動 |
| `make codex` | コンテナ内で Codex 起動 |
| `make ab-start` | ホストの agent-browser 起動 |
| `make clean` | コンテナ・ボリューム削除 |

## Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| **agent-browser はホスト実行** | Chrome とディスプレイが必要。コンテナからは WebSocket で接続 |
| **MCP は後日対応** | まずコアツール（RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM）で動く環境を優先 |
| **シークレットは env var で注入** | `.env` ファイル経由でホストからコンテナに環境変数を渡す |
| **RTK はプリビルドバイナリ** | GitHub Releases に .deb / .tar.gz あり。Rust ビルダー不要 |
| **Debian Trixie slim** | GLIBC 2.40（RTK ARM64 が GLIBC 2.39 要求）。Alpine の musl は Rust バイナリで問題 |
| **rg (ripgrep) を同梱** | RTK の grep フィルタが自動利用、80% のトークン削減 |

## Future Scope (v2)

- **MCP servers**: brave-search, context7, agent-browser MCP 等の統合
- **CI profile**: GitHub Actions 用 headless テスト環境
- **Sandbox profile**: ネットワーク制限付き Claude Code 実行環境
- **Cloud browser backends**: CI での Browserbase/Browserless 連携
- **Multi-architecture**: ARM64 (Apple Silicon) + AMD64 ビルド

file.content:
name: Build and Push

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  REGISTRY: ghcr.io
  IMAGE_NAME: ${{ github.repository }}

jobs:
  build-push:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        id: meta
        with:
          images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
          tags: |
            type=sha
            type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}

      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: .
          file: docker/Dockerfile
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

```
┌─ Host OS (macOS) ──────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  agent-browser (Chrome, port 9223)                     │
│  環境変数を env var として注入                          │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                         │ host.docker.internal
┌─ Docker Compose ───────┴───────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  ┌─ workspace ───────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Tools: RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM, gh, rg │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Volumes:                                         │ │
│  │    - /workspace ← project source (bind mount)     │ │
│  │    - ~/.claude  ← claude-home (named volume)      │ │
│  │    - ~/.codex   ← codex-home (named volume)       │ │
│  │    - ~/.local/share/mise ← mise-data (named vol)  │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Tools in Container

| Tool | Version | Purpose | Install Method |
|------|---------|---------|----------------|
| **RTK** | 0.42.4 | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% savings) | GitHub Releases からプリビルドバイナリ |
| **mise** | latest | Dev tool version manager (Node, Ruby, etc.) | curl https://mise.run |
| **Claude Code** | latest | Anthropic's AI CLI | curl https://claude.ai/install.sh |
| **Codex** | latest | OpenAI's AI CLI | curl https://chatgpt.com/codex/install.sh |
| **APM** | 0.16+ | Agent Package Manager | curl https://aka.ms/apm-unix |
| **gh** | latest | GitHub CLI | apt install |

### RTK が利用する外部コマンド

RTK は内部で外部コマンドを呼び出してフィルタリングする。コンテナに含める必要がある。

#### 必須（RTK が直接実行）

| Command | Purpose | Install |

| **tree** | ディレクトリ表示 | apt |
| **curl** | HTTP client | apt |
| **wc** | 行数カウント等 | apt (coreutils) |

#### 推奨（RTK が自動検出して利用、大幅なトークン削減）

| Command | Purpose | Install | Savings |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| **rg** (ripgrep) | 高速 grep、RTK が自動的に利用 | apt or cargo | grep 比 80% 削減 |

#### プロキシ対象（開発で使うもの、RTK がラップ）

| Command | Purpose | Install |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **gh** | GitHub CLI | apt |
| **docker** | コンテナ操作（DinD/socket mount 時） | 必要に応じて |

> **Note:** RTK は単一 Rust バイナリで、外部ツールがなくても graceful に degradation する。
> `rg` は特に重要 — RTK の grep フィルタが自動で ripgrep を利用し、トークン消費を大幅削減する。

### Host OS Services

| Service | Purpose | Connection |
|---------|---------|------------|
| **agent-browser** | Browser automation with real Chrome | WebSocket on port 9223 |
| **環境変数** | Secret management | ホスト側で解決済みの値を env var で注入 |

## File Structure

```
agent-stack/
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── build-push.yml      # main push で ghcr.io に自動ビルド・push
├── docker/
│   └── Dockerfile              # Single-stage build (debian:trixie-slim)
├── config/
│   ├── claude/
│   │   ├── settings.json       # RTK hook + permission allowlist
│   │   └── CLAUDE.md           # Container-specific instructions
│   ├── codex/
│   │   └── instructions.md     # Container-specific instructions
│   └── mise/
│       └── config.toml         # Runtime versions (Node 23, Ruby, etc.)
├── compose.yml                 # Docker Compose orchestration
├── apm.yml                     # APM manifest
├── .mise.toml                  # Project-level mise config
├── .env.example                # Required environment variables
├── .gitignore
├── Makefile                    # Build/run/manage commands
├── architecture.md             # This file
└── CLAUDE.md                   # Project instructions
```

## Dockerfile Design

Single-stage build。全ツールがプリビルドバイナリまたはインストーラー（`curl`）で導入できるため、マルチステージ不要。

```
debian:trixie-slim
       │
  ┌────┴──────────┐
  │               │
  │ build-essential│
  │ locales (UTF-8)│
  │ RTK (deb)     │
  │ mise, gh      │
  │ rg, tree      │
  │ claude, codex │
  │ user: agent   │
  │               │
  └───────────────┘
```

## Docker Compose Services

### workspace

メインの開発コンテナ。全ツールを含み、プロジェクトソースをバインドマウント。

- **Build target**: `dev`
- **Volumes**: project source (bind), claude config (named), codex config (named), mise data (named)
- **Environment**: API keys via `.env`
- **Network**: `host.docker.internal` でホストの agent-browser に接続

## Secret Management

```
┌─ .env (gitignored) ─────────────────────┐
│ ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...            │
│ OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...                   │
│ GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...    │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────┘
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Docker Compose ────────────────────────┐
│ env_file: .env                          │
│   → workspace container                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Makefile Targets

| Target | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `make build` | Docker イメージビルド |
| `make dev` | 開発環境起動 |
| `make shell` | workspace コンテナにシェルで入る |
| `make claude` | コンテナ内で Claude Code 起動 |
| `make codex` | コンテナ内で Codex 起動 |
| `make ab-start` | ホストの agent-browser 起動 |
| `make clean` | コンテナ・ボリューム削除 |

## Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| **agent-browser はホスト実行** | Chrome とディスプレイが必要。コンテナからは WebSocket で接続 |
| **MCP は後日対応** | まずコアツール（RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM）で動く環境を優先 |
| **シークレットは env var で注入** | `.env` ファイル経由でホストからコンテナに環境変数を渡す |
| **RTK はプリビルドバイナリ** | GitHub Releases に .deb / .tar.gz あり。Rust ビルダー不要 |
| **Debian Trixie slim** | GLIBC 2.40（RTK ARM64 が GLIBC 2.39 要求）。Alpine の musl は Rust バイナリで問題 |
| **rg (ripgrep) を同梱** | RTK の grep フィルタが自動利用、80% のトークン削減 |

## Usage (他プロジェクトからの利用)

```yaml
# my-project/compose.yml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/mizuki-y/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

または直接:
```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/mizuki-y/agent-stack bash
```

## CI/CD

GitHub Actions で main push 時に ghcr.io へ自動ビルド・push。タグは `latest` + commit SHA。

## Future Scope (v2)

- **MCP servers**: brave-search, context7, agent-browser MCP 等の統合
- **CI profile**: GitHub Actions 用 headless テスト環境
- **Sandbox profile**: ネットワーク制限付き Claude Code 実行環境
- **Cloud browser backends**: CI での Browserbase/Browserless 連携
- **Multi-architecture**: ARM64 (Apple Silicon) + AMD64 ビルド

# agent-stack: AI 開発用 Docker コンテナスタック

## Overview

AI エージェント開発で使うツール群（RTK, mise, APM, Claude Code, Codex）を Docker コンテナとしてまとめ、再現可能な開発環境を構築する。ホスト OS の agent-browser（Vercel Labs）と連携し、ブラウザテストも統合する。

## Architecture

```
┌─ Host OS (macOS) ──────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  agent-browser (Chrome, port 9223)                     │
│  環境変数を env var として注入                          │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
                         │ host.docker.internal
┌─ Docker Compose ───────┴───────────────────────────────┐
│                                                        │
│  ┌─ workspace ───────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Tools: RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM, gh, rg │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  │  Volumes:                                         │ │
│  │    - /workspace ← project source (bind mount)     │ │
│  │    - ~/.claude  ← claude-home (named volume)      │ │
│  │    - ~/.codex   ← codex-home (named volume)       │ │
│  │    - ~/.local/share/mise ← mise-data (named vol)  │ │
│  │                                                   │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                        │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Components

### Tools in Container

| Tool | Version | Purpose | Install Method |
|------|---------|---------|----------------|
| **RTK** | 0.42.4 | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% savings) | GitHub Releases からプリビルドバイナリ |
| **mise** | latest | Dev tool version manager (Node, Ruby, etc.) | curl https://mise.run |
| **Claude Code** | latest | Anthropic's AI CLI | curl https://claude.ai/install.sh |
| **Codex** | latest | OpenAI's AI CLI | curl https://chatgpt.com/codex/install.sh |
| **APM** | 0.16+ | Agent Package Manager | curl https://aka.ms/apm-unix |
| **gh** | latest | GitHub CLI | apt install |

### RTK が利用する外部コマンド

RTK は内部で外部コマンドを呼び出してフィルタリングする。コンテナに含める必要がある。

#### 必須（RTK が直接実行）

| Command | Purpose | Install |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **git** | VCS 操作 | apt |
| **grep** | テキスト検索（rg がない場合のフォールバック） | apt (coreutils) |
| **tree** | ディレクトリ表示 | apt |
| **curl** | HTTP client | apt |
| **wc** | 行数カウント等 | apt (coreutils) |

#### 推奨（RTK が自動検出して利用、大幅なトークン削減）

| Command | Purpose | Install | Savings |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| **rg** (ripgrep) | 高速 grep、RTK が自動的に利用 | apt or cargo | grep 比 80% 削減 |

#### プロキシ対象（開発で使うもの、RTK がラップ）

| Command | Purpose | Install |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **gh** | GitHub CLI | apt |
| **docker** | コンテナ操作（DinD/socket mount 時） | 必要に応じて |

> **Note:** RTK は単一 Rust バイナリで、外部ツールがなくても graceful に degradation する。
> `rg` は特に重要 — RTK の grep フィルタが自動で ripgrep を利用し、トークン消費を大幅削減する。

### Host OS Services

| Service | Purpose | Connection |
|---------|---------|------------|
| **agent-browser** | Browser automation with real Chrome | WebSocket on port 9223 |
| **環境変数** | Secret management | ホスト側で解決済みの値を env var で注入 |

## File Structure

```
agent-stack/
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── build-push.yml      # main push で ghcr.io に自動ビルド・push
├── docker/
│   └── Dockerfile              # Single-stage build (debian:trixie-slim)
├── config/
│   ├── claude/
│   │   ├── settings.json       # RTK hook + permission allowlist
│   │   └── CLAUDE.md           # Container-specific instructions
│   ├── codex/
│   │   └── instructions.md     # Container-specific instructions
│   └── mise/
│       └── config.toml         # Runtime versions (Node 23, Ruby, etc.)
├── compose.yml                 # Docker Compose orchestration
├── apm.yml                     # APM manifest
├── .mise.toml                  # Project-level mise config
├── .env.example                # Required environment variables
├── .gitignore
├── Makefile                    # Build/run/manage commands
├── architecture.md             # This file
└── CLAUDE.md                   # Project instructions
```

## Dockerfile Design

Single-stage build。全ツールがプリビルドバイナリまたはインストーラー（`curl`）で導入できるため、マルチステージ不要。

```
debian:trixie-slim
       │
  ┌────┴──────────┐
  │               │
  │ build-essential│
  │ locales (UTF-8)│
  │ RTK (deb)     │
  │ mise, gh      │
  │ rg, tree      │
  │ claude, codex │
  │ user: agent   │
  │               │
  └───────────────┘
```

## Docker Compose Services

### workspace

メインの開発コンテナ。全ツールを含み、プロジェクトソースをバインドマウント。

- **Build target**: `dev`
- **Volumes**: project source (bind), claude config (named), codex config (named), mise data (named)
- **Environment**: API keys via `.env`
- **Network**: `host.docker.internal` でホストの agent-browser に接続

## Secret Management

```
┌─ .env (gitignored) ─────────────────────┐
│ ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...            │
│ OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...                   │
│ GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...    │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────┘
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Docker Compose ────────────────────────┐
│ env_file: .env                          │
│   → workspace container                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Makefile Targets

| Target | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `make build` | Docker イメージビルド |
| `make dev` | 開発環境起動 |
| `make shell` | workspace コンテナにシェルで入る |
| `make claude` | コンテナ内で Claude Code 起動 |
| `make codex` | コンテナ内で Codex 起動 |
| `make ab-start` | ホストの agent-browser 起動 |
| `make clean` | コンテナ・ボリューム削除 |

## Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| **agent-browser はホスト実行** | Chrome とディスプレイが必要。コンテナからは WebSocket で接続 |
| **MCP は後日対応** | まずコアツール（RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM）で動く環境を優先 |
| **シークレットは env var で注入** | `.env` ファイル経由でホストからコンテナに環境変数を渡す |
| **RTK はプリビルドバイナリ** | GitHub Releases に .deb / .tar.gz あり。Rust ビルダー不要 |
| **Debian Trixie slim** | GLIBC 2.40（RTK ARM64 が GLIBC 2.39 要求）。Alpine の musl は Rust バイナリで問題 |
| **rg (ripgrep) を同梱** | RTK の grep フィルタが自動利用、80% のトークン削減 |

## Usage (他プロジェクトからの利用)

```yaml
# my-project/compose.yml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

または直接:
```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack bash
```

## CI/CD

GitHub Actions で main push 時に ghcr.io へ自動ビルド・push。タグは `latest` + commit SHA。

## Future Scope (v2)

- **MCP servers**: brave-search, context7, agent-browser MCP 等の統合
- **CI profile**: GitHub Actions 用 headless テスト環境
- **Sandbox profile**: ネットワーク制限付き Claude Code 実行環境
- **Cloud browser backends**: CI での Browserbase/Browserless 連携
- **Multi-architecture**: ARM64 (Apple Silicon) + AMD64 ビルド

file.content:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

aiTitle: AI Docker container with MCP and agent-browser setup

input.content:
# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), and [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Pull from ghcr.io:

```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack bash
```

Or use in your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true
```

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## Architecture

See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for design details.

## License

MIT

message.content: これ git worktree つかった開発の場合どうしようか？

content.text:
worktree の場合、2つの問題があります:

1. **`.git` ファイルの参照先** — worktree ディレクトリの `.git` はファイルで、`gitdir: /host/path/.git/worktrees/<name>` とホスト側の絶対パスが書かれている。コンテナ内ではそのパスが存在しない
2. **複数ブランチ同時作業** — worktree ごとにコンテナが必要

解決策としては:

- **親ディレクトリごとマウント** — worktree とメインリポジトリが同じ親にあれば、親をまるごとマウントすればパスが解決する
- **`.git` を別途マウント** — メインリポジトリの `.git` ディレクトリを追加でマウント

普段 worktree をどういうディレクトリ構成で使ってますか？

questions.question: git worktree のディレクトリ構成はどのようにしていますか？

options.label: 兄弟ディレクトリ
options.description: ~/Projects/my-app/ (main) と ~/Projects/my-app-feature/ (worktree) のように同じ親の下に並ぶ

options.label: サブディレクトリ
options.description: ~/Projects/my-app/.worktrees/feature/ のようにリポジトリの中に作る

options.label: まだ決めていない
options.description: agent-stack に合わせて決めたい

input.prompt: Explain what git-wt does, how it manages worktrees, what directory structure it creates, and how to install it. Include any relevant CLI commands and examples.

content.content:
# git-wt: Simplified Git Worktree Management

## What it Does

git-wt is a Git subcommand that streamlines working with multiple branches simultaneously. Rather than memorizing complex `git worktree` syntax, it provides intuitive commands for creating, switching, and managing isolated working directories—each with its own branch.

## How It Manages Worktrees

The tool organizes worktrees in a base directory (default: `.wt`) and allows you to reference them by:
- **Branch name**: `git wt feature-branch`
- **Directory name**: `git wt some-worktree-folder`
- **File path**: `git wt ../sibling` or `/absolute/path`

Key operations include:
- **List**: `git wt` or `git wt --json`
- **Create/Switch**: `git wt <branch>` (creates if needed)
- **Separate names**: `git wt -b user/my-feature my-feature`
- **Rename**: `git wt -m old-name new-name`
- **Delete**: `git wt -d <target>` (safe) or `-D` (force)

## Directory Structure

By default, worktrees nest under `.wt/` relative to your repository root. You can customize this via `git config wt.basedir`. The documentation notes that placing worktrees in `.git/wt` avoids tools traversing parent directories and scanning unnecessary files.

## Installation

**Via Go:**
```
go install github.com/k1LoW/git-wt@latest
```

**Via Homebrew:**
```
brew install k1LoW/tap/git-wt
```

**Manual:** Download binaries from the GitHub releases page.

## Shell Integration

Enable automatic directory switching with `eval "$(git wt --init zsh)"` (bash, fish, and PowerShell also supported). This creates a wrapper function allowing seamless navigation between worktrees.

content.text:
なるほど。`git-wt` は `.wt/` ディレクトリ配下に worktree を作る方式ですね。つまり:

```
my-project/          # メインリポジトリ (.git あり)
├── .wt/
│   ├── feature-a/   # worktree
│   └── feature-b/   # worktree
├── src/
└── ...
```

この構成なら、リポジトリルートをマウントすれば `.git` も `.wt/` も全部コンテナ内に入るので、worktree の問題は発生しません。

ただし agent-stack の compose.yml でマウントしているのは `.:/workspace` なので、コンテナ内で `git wt` を使うには `git-wt` もイメージに入れる必要があります。

Dockerfile に `git-wt` を追加して、architecture.md にも反映しますか？

file.content:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

message.content: bashrc に eval "$(git wt --init bash)" たさなくていいの？

content.text: 必要ですね。`git wt` でディレクトリ移動が効くようにするにはシェル関数の登録が要ります。

# ~/.bashrc: executed by bash(1) for non-login shells.
# see /usr/share/doc/bash/examples/startup-files (in the package bash-doc)
# for examples

# If not running interactively, don't do anything
case $- in
    *i*) ;;
      *) return;;
esac

# don't put duplicate lines or lines starting with space in the history.
# See bash(1) for more options
HISTCONTROL=ignoreboth

# append to the history file, don't overwrite it
shopt -s histappend

# for setting history length see HISTSIZE and HISTFILESIZE in bash(1)
HISTSIZE=1000
HISTFILESIZE=2000

# check the window size after each command and, if necessary,
# update the values of LINES and COLUMNS.
shopt -s checkwinsize

# If set, the pattern "**" used in a pathname expansion context will
# match all files and zero or more directories and subdirectories.
#shopt -s globstar

# make less more friendly for non-text input files, see lesspipe(1)
#[ -x /usr/bin/lesspipe ] && eval "$(SHELL=/bin/sh lesspipe)"

# set variable identifying the chroot you work in (used in the prompt below)
if [ -z "${debian_chroot:-}" ] && [ -r /etc/debian_chroot ]; then
    debian_chroot=$(cat /etc/debian_chroot)
fi

# set a fancy prompt (non-color, unless we know we "want" color)
case "$TERM" in
    xterm-color|*-256color) color_prompt=yes;;
esac

# uncomment for a colored prompt, if the terminal has the capability; turned
# off by default to not distract the user: the focus in a terminal window
# should be on the output of commands, not on the prompt
#force_color_prompt=yes

if [ -n "$force_color_prompt" ]; then
    if [ -x /usr/bin/tput ] && tput setaf 1 >&/dev/null; then
	# We have color support; assume it's compliant with Ecma-48
	# (ISO/IEC-6429). (Lack of such support is extremely rare, and such
	# a case would tend to support setf rather than setaf.)
	color_prompt=yes
    else
	color_prompt=
    fi
fi

if [ "$color_prompt" = yes ]; then
    PS1='${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\[\033[01;32m\]\u@\h\[\033[00m\]:\[\033[01;34m\]\w\[\033[00m\]\$ '
else
    PS1='${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h:\w\$ '
fi
unset color_prompt force_color_prompt

# If this is an xterm set the title to user@host:dir
case "$TERM" in
xterm*|rxvt*)
    PS1="\[\e]0;${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h: \w\a\]$PS1"
    ;;
*)
    ;;
esac

# enable color support of ls and also add handy aliases
if [ -x /usr/bin/dircolors ]; then
    test -r ~/.dircolors && eval "$(dircolors -b ~/.dircolors)" || eval "$(dircolors -b)"
    alias ls='ls --color=auto'
    #alias dir='dir --color=auto'
    #alias vdir='vdir --color=auto'

    #alias grep='grep --color=auto'
    #alias fgrep='fgrep --color=auto'
    #alias egrep='egrep --color=auto'
fi

# colored GCC warnings and errors
#export GCC_COLORS='error=01;31:warning=01;35:note=01;36:caret=01;32:locus=01:quote=01'

# some more ls aliases
#alias ll='ls -l'
#alias la='ls -A'
#alias l='ls -CF'

# Alias definitions.
# You may want to put all your additions into a separate file like
# ~/.bash_aliases, instead of adding them here directly.
# See /usr/share/doc/bash-doc/examples in the bash-doc package.

if [ -f ~/.bash_aliases ]; then
    . ~/.bash_aliases
fi

# enable programmable completion features (you don't need to enable
# this, if it's already enabled in /etc/bash.bashrc and /etc/profile
# sources /etc/bash.bashrc).
if ! shopt -oq posix; then
  if [ -f /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion ]; then
    . /usr/share/bash-completion/bash_completion
  elif [ -f /etc/bash_completion ]; then
    . /etc/bash_completion
  fi
fi

toolUseResult.originalFile:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent \
    && echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

file.content:
services:
  workspace:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
      - claude-home:/home/agent/.claude
      - codex-home:/home/agent/.codex
      - mise-data:/home/agent/.local/share/mise
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
    working_dir: /workspace
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true

volumes:
  claude-home:
  codex-home:
  mise-data:

input.prompt: What is entire.io? What does it do? How to install it? Is it a developer tool? CLI?

content.content:
# Entire.io Overview

**What it is:** Entire is a developer platform that functions as a CLI tool for capturing and organizing AI agent work sessions alongside git commits.

**Main functionality:** The platform hooks into your git workflow to automatically record AI agent sessions (like those from Claude Code, Gemini CLI, or Cursor) and links them to corresponding commits, creating searchable checkpoints of how code was written.

**Key features:**
- Automatic session capture on every push without manual steps
- Integration with multiple AI agents and coding tools
- Storage directly in git history rather than external databases
- Searchable record to understand the reasoning behind code changes
- Helps agents access full codebase history, not just code itself

**Installation:** Users can install via a single command:
```bash
curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | sh
```

**License & Cost:** The tool is "open source · MIT licensed" and free to use, with source code available on GitHub.

In essence, it's a developer tool designed to bridge the gap between AI-assisted coding sessions and version control, preserving the context and decision-making process behind code changes.

toolUseResult.result:
# Entire.io Overview

**What it is:** Entire is a developer platform that functions as a CLI tool for capturing and organizing AI agent work sessions alongside git commits.

**Main functionality:** The platform hooks into your git workflow to automatically record AI agent sessions (like those from Claude Code, Gemini CLI, or Cursor) and links them to corresponding commits, creating searchable checkpoints of how code was written.

**Key features:**
- Automatic session capture on every push without manual steps
- Integration with multiple AI agents and coding tools
- Storage directly in git history rather than external databases
- Searchable record to understand the reasoning behind code changes
- Helps agents access full codebase history, not just code itself

**Installation:** Users can install via a single command:
```bash
curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | sh
```

**License & Cost:** The tool is "open source · MIT licensed" and free to use, with source code available on GitHub.

In essence, it's a developer tool designed to bridge the gap between AI-assisted coding sessions and version control, preserving the context and decision-making process behind code changes.

file.content:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

toolUseResult.originalFile:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

message.content: docker attach っていくつでもできる？

content.text:
はい、`docker exec` は何個でも同時にできます。同じコンテナに複数シェルを開けます。

```bash
# ターミナル1
docker exec -it workspace bash
claude

# ターミナル2
docker exec -it workspace bash
codex
```

ただし `docker attach` は1つのプロセス（PID 1）の stdin/stdout を共有するので、複数アタッチすると入力が混ざります。なので `docker exec` を使うのが正解です。

file.content:
# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), and [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Pull from ghcr.io:

```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack bash
```

Or use in your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true
```

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## Architecture

See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for design details.

## License

MIT

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Pull from ghcr.io:

```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack bash

```yaml

| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |

## Environment Variables

## Architecture

## License

MIT

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## Architecture

See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for design details.

## License

MIT

message.content:
stdin_open: true
    tty: true
これってなんでひつようなんだっけ？

content.text:
`stdin_open: true` (`-i`) はコンテナの stdin を開いたままにする、`tty: true` (`-t`) は擬似端末を割り当てる設定です。

ただ、このイメージの使い方は `docker exec -it workspace bash` でシェルに入るので、`docker compose up -d` でバックグラウンド起動するだけなら不要ですね。

必要になるのは `docker attach` でコンテナの PID 1 に直接アタッチしたい場合ですが、先の議論で `docker exec` を使う方が良いという話になったので、外してしまっても問題ないです。

ただし、`docker compose up -d` でコンテナを起動したままにするには CMD が終了しないことが必要です。今の `CMD ["bash"]` だと `stdin_open: true` がないと bash が即終了してコンテナが停止します。

選択肢:
1. **`stdin_open: true` を残す** — 今のまま。bash が入力待ちで生き続ける
2. **CMD を `sleep infinity` に変更** — stdin 不要で常駐。`docker exec` で入る前提

どちらにしますか？

message.content: 即終了すると、exec できないってことね

content.text:
はい、その通りです。コンテナが停止していると `docker exec` する先がないので。

`sleep infinity` に変えた方がシンプルですね。stdin_open/tty は不要になります。

toolUseResult.originalFile:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# entire (AI session capture for git)
RUN curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["bash"]

file.content:
# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Pull from ghcr.io:

```bash
docker run -it -v $(pwd):/workspace --env-file .env ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack bash
```

Or use in your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true
```

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [entire](https://entire.io) | AI session capture for git |
| [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) | Simplified git worktree management |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## Architecture

See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for design details.

## License

MIT

input.new_string:
## Quick Start

Add to your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

Start the container and connect:

```bash
docker compose up -d
docker compose exec -it agent bash
```

Use `docker compose exec` (not `docker attach`). Each `exec` spawns an independent process, so multiple agents can run in parallel without stdin conflicts.

content.text:
ホストだけで十分です。

- **ホスト**: agent-browser を起動して Chrome を操作する（ディスプレイが必要）
- **コンテナ**: MCP 経由で接続する形になるが、MCP は v2 で対応予定

コンテナに agent-browser CLI を入れても、ブラウザはホスト側にあるので、結局 MCP か WebSocket で繋ぐ必要があります。MCP を入れるタイミングで一緒に対応すれば良いと思います。

file.content:
# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Add to your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

Start the container and connect:

```bash
docker compose up -d
docker compose exec -it agent bash
```

Use `docker compose exec` (not `docker attach`). Each `exec` spawns an independent process, so multiple agents can run in parallel without stdin conflicts.

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [entire](https://entire.io) | AI session capture for git |
| [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) | Simplified git worktree management |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## Architecture

See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for design details.

## License

MIT

content.text: プリビルドバイナリがあります。

content.content:
1	FROM debian:trixie-slim
2	
3	ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
4	ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
5	ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
6	ARG TARGETARCH
7	
8	ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
9	ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
10	
11	# System packages
12	RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
13	    build-essential \
14	    ca-certificates \
15	    curl \
16	    git \
17	    grep \
18	    jq \
19	    locales \
20	    openssh-client \
21	    ripgrep \
22	    tree \
23	    unzip \
24	    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
25	    && locale-gen \
26	    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
27	
28	# GitHub CLI
29	RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
30	      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
31	    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
32	      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
33	    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
34	    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
35	
36	# RTK
37	RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
38	      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
39	      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
40	      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
41	    esac \
42	    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
43	    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
44	         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
45	       else \
46	         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
47	       fi \
48	    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"
49	
50	# git-wt
51	RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
52	      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
53	    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
54	    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb
55	
56	# Non-root user
57	RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
58	RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
59	USER agent
60	WORKDIR /home/agent
61	
62	# mise
63	RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
64	ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"
65	
66	# Claude Code
67	RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
68	
69	# entire (AI session capture for git)
70	RUN curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash
71	
72	# Codex
73	RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
74	      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
75	      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
76	      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
77	    esac \
78	    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
79	      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
80	    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
81	    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
82	    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz
83	
84	# APM (requires python3)
85	USER root
86	RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
87	    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
88	USER agent
89	RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli
90	
91	WORKDIR /workspace
92	CMD ["sleep", "infinity"]
93

file.content:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# entire (AI session capture for git)
RUN curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent

toolUseResult.originalFile:
FROM debian:trixie-slim

ARG RTK_VERSION=0.42.4
ARG CODEX_VERSION=0.141.0
ARG GIT_WT_VERSION=0.29.0
ARG TARGETARCH

ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    grep \
    jq \
    locales \
    openssh-client \
    ripgrep \
    tree \
    unzip \
    && sed -i 's/^# *\(C.UTF-8\)/\1/' /etc/locale.gen \
    && locale-gen \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# GitHub CLI
RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
      -o /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
      > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# RTK
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) RTK_PKG="rtk_${RTK_VERSION}-1_amd64.deb" ;; \
      arm64) RTK_PKG="rtk-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/download/v${RTK_VERSION}/${RTK_PKG}" -o "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" \
    && if [ "${TARGETARCH}" = "amd64" ]; then \
         dpkg -i "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"; \
       else \
         tar xzf "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}" -C /usr/local/bin; \
       fi \
    && rm -f "/tmp/${RTK_PKG}"

# git-wt
RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt/releases/download/v${GIT_WT_VERSION}/git-wt_${GIT_WT_VERSION}-1_${TARGETARCH}.deb" \
      -o /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && dpkg -i /tmp/git-wt.deb \
    && rm /tmp/git-wt.deb

# Non-root user
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash agent
RUN echo 'eval "$(git wt --init bash)"' >> /home/agent/.bashrc
USER agent
WORKDIR /home/agent

# mise
RUN curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh
ENV PATH="/home/agent/.local/bin:${PATH}"

# Claude Code
RUN curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# entire (AI session capture for git)
RUN curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash

# Codex
RUN case "${TARGETARCH}" in \
      amd64) CODEX_ARCH="x86_64" ;; \
      arm64) CODEX_ARCH="aarch64" ;; \
      *) echo "Unsupported arch: ${TARGETARCH}" && exit 1 ;; \
    esac \
    && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/rust-v${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-${CODEX_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
      -o /tmp/codex.tar.gz \
    && tar xzf /tmp/codex.tar.gz -C /home/agent/.local/bin \
    && mv /home/agent/.local/bin/codex-*-unknown-linux-musl /home/agent/.local/bin/codex \
    && rm /tmp/codex.tar.gz

# APM (requires python3)
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER agent
RUN pip3 install --user --break-system-packages apm-cli

WORKDIR /workspace
CMD ["sleep", "infinity"]

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Add to your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

Start the container and connect:

```bash
docker compose up -d
docker compose exec -it agent bash
```

Use `docker compose exec` (not `docker attach`). Each `exec` spawns an independent process, so multiple agents can run in parallel without stdin conflicts.

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [entire](https://entire.io) | AI session capture for git |
| [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) | Simplified git worktree management |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

See [compose.yml](compose.yml) for a working example.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) runs on the host OS (requires Chrome). The container connects via `host.docker.internal`:

```bash
# On host
agent-browser stream enable --port 9223

# In container, agent-browser CLI connects to host
```

## License

MIT

# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Add to your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

Start the container and connect:

```bash
docker compose up -d
docker compose exec -it agent bash
```

Use `docker compose exec` (not `docker attach`). Each `exec` spawns an independent process, so multiple agents can run in parallel without stdin conflicts.

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [entire](https://entire.io) | AI session capture for git |
| [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) | Simplified git worktree management |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

See [compose.yml](compose.yml) for a working example.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) is pre-installed in the container. Launch Chrome on the host with remote debugging, and connect from the container:

```bash
# On host: start Chrome with remote debugging
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222

# In container: connect to host Chrome
agent-browser connect host.docker.internal:9222
```

## License

MIT

content: AI開発用Dockerコンテナスタック(agent-stack)を構築中。RTK, mise, Claude Code, Codex, APM, entire, git-wt, agent-browserを含むイメージが完成しghcr.ioへの自動push設定済み。GitHub Actionsのビルド結果を確認するのが次のステップ。

message.content:
chrome を rdp を立てたけど docker からつながる？
Server running at: 127.0.0.1:9222

content.text:
`127.0.0.1` にバインドされているので、Docker からはアクセスできません。`host.docker.internal` はホストの外部インターフェースを指すので、Chrome が localhost のみで listen していると拒否されます。

Chrome を全インターフェースでバインドする必要があります:

```bash
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222 --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0
```

ただしこれはネットワーク上の誰でもアクセスできてしまうので、ローカル開発限定で使ってください。

message.content: agent 用の profile とかあったほうがいい？

content.text:
あると便利ですね。普段使いの Chrome とセッション・拡張機能・Cookie が混ざらないように、agent 専用のプロファイルを分離できます。

```bash
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome \
  --remote-debugging-port=9222 \
  --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0 \
  --user-data-dir=$HOME/.chrome-agent
```

`--user-data-dir` で専用ディレクトリを指定すれば、通常の Chrome と完全に分離した状態で起動します。README に書いておきますか？

message.content: 実行してみましたがつながりますか？

input.description: Test Chrome remote debugging connection from container

content.content: Host header is specified and is not an IP address or localhost.

toolUseResult.stdout: Host header is specified and is not an IP address or localhost.

content.text:
Chrome が `Host` ヘッダーを検証して拒否しています。`--remote-allow-origins=*` フラグが必要です。

ホスト側の Chrome を以下で再起動してください:

```bash
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome \
  --remote-debugging-port=9222 \
  --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0 \
  --remote-allow-origins=* \
  --user-data-dir=$HOME/.chrome-agent
```

message.content: zsh: no matches found: --remote-allow-origins=*

content.text:
zsh が `*` をグロブ展開しようとしています。クォートで囲んでください:

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) is pre-installed in the container. Launch Chrome on the host with remote debugging, and connect from the container:

```bash
# On host: start Chrome with remote debugging

agent-browser connect host.docker.internal:9222
```

input.new_string:
## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) is pre-installed in the container. Launch a dedicated Chrome on the host with remote debugging:

```bash
# On host: start Chrome with agent profile
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome \
  --remote-debugging-port=9222 \
  --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0 \
  '--remote-allow-origins=*' \
  --user-data-dir=$HOME/.chrome-agent
```

Chrome rejects the `Host: host.docker.internal` header, so connect using the WebSocket URL via IP:

```bash
# In container
IP=$(getent hosts host.docker.internal | awk '{print $1}')
WS=$(curl -s -H "Host: localhost" http://$IP:9222/json/version | jq -r .webSocketDebuggerUrl \
  | sed "s|ws://localhost|ws://$IP:9222|")
agent-browser connect "$WS"
```

# agent-stack

AI agent development container with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code), [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex), [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/), [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm), [entire](https://entire.io), and [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) pre-installed.

## Quick Start

Add to your project's `compose.yml`:

```yaml
services:
  agent:
    image: ghcr.io/syati/agent-stack:latest
    volumes:
      - .:/workspace
    env_file:
      - .env
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
```

Start the container and connect:

```bash
docker compose up -d
docker compose exec -it agent bash
```

Use `docker compose exec` (not `docker attach`). Each `exec` spawns an independent process, so multiple agents can run in parallel without stdin conflicts.

## What's Inside

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) | Anthropic's AI coding CLI |
| [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) | OpenAI's AI coding CLI |
| [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) | Token-optimized CLI proxy (60-90% token savings) |
| [mise](https://mise.jdx.dev/) | Dev tool version manager |
| [APM](https://github.com/microsoft/apm) | Agent Package Manager for MCP/skills |
| [entire](https://entire.io) | AI session capture for git |
| [git-wt](https://github.com/k1LoW/git-wt) | Simplified git worktree management |
| [gh](https://cli.github.com/) | GitHub CLI |
| [ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep) | Fast grep (auto-used by RTK) |
| [agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) | Browser automation for AI agents |
| build-essential | C/C++ compiler toolchain |

## Environment Variables

Create a `.env` file:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

## Local Build

See [compose.yml](compose.yml) for a working example.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Syati/agent-stack.git
cd agent-stack
cp .env.example .env
# edit .env with your keys

make build   # build image
make dev     # start container
make shell   # open shell
make claude  # run Claude Code
make codex   # run Codex
make clean   # stop and remove
```

## agent-browser Integration

[agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) is pre-installed in the container. Launch Chrome on the host with remote debugging, and connect from the container:

```bash
# On host: start Chrome with remote debugging
/Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222

# In container: connect to host Chrome
agent-browser connect host.docker.internal:9222
```

## License

MIT
